title: gynochthodes rugulosa
intro: Gynochthodes rugulosa, also known as the Rough-barked Gynochthodes, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Gynochthodes rugulosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Gynochthodes rugulosa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
